---
title: "NQBH"
description-meta: "NQBH's website: sharable & publishable collections"
image: "files/images/Rose.jpg"
image-width: 30%
page-navigation: true
toc: true
sidebar: true

about:
  id: hero-heading
  template: jolla
  image-width: 30%
  links:
    - icon: sun
      text: Lab
      href: https://www.github.com
      target: _blank
    - icon: globe
      text: Uprofile
      href: https://baruch.cuny.edu
      target: _blank
    - icon: envelope
      text: E-mail
      href: mailto:email@gmail.com    
    - icon: linkedin
      text: LinkedIn
      href: https://linkedin.com
      target: _blank
    - icon: youtube
      text: YouTube
      href: https://www.youtube.com     
      target: _blank 
    - text: "{{< ai orcid >}} ORCID"   # use academic icons, "" are needed, you also need to install the fontawesome extension
      href: https://orcid.org
      target: _blank
    - text: "{{< ai clarivate >}} Web of Science"
      href: https://www.webofscience.com  
      target: _blank
    - text: "{{< ai scopus >}} Scopus"
      href: https://www.scopus.com
      target: _blank
    - text: "{{< ai google-scholar >}} Google Scholar"
      href: https://scholar.google.com
      target: _blank
    - text: "{{< ai researchgate >}} Research Gate"
      href: https://www.researchgate.net
      target: _blank

listing:   # Comment the listing section and delete corresponding lines in the index.qmd file to remove the recent posts
  - id: recent-posts
    contents: 
      - posts
      - posts/post-links.yml
    exclude:
      title: ""
    type: grid
    max-items: 3
    image-height: 150px
    page-size: 3 #set same as max-times to remove the page number setting
    fields: [image, date, title, subtitle]
    max-description-length: 150
    sort: 
      - "date desc"
      - "title asc"
---

:::{#hero-heading}

My Vietnamese- & publication names are Nguyễn Quản Bá Hồng (NQBH) & Nguyen Quan Ba Hong, respectively.

## Curriculum Vitae (CV)

My not-so-good academic CV: [CV](https://github.com/NQBH/publication/blob/master/CV/NQBH_CV.pdf).

E-mails: `nguyenquanbahong@gmail.com`, `hong.nguyenquanba@umt.edu.vn`.
The former is used for general purposes & the latter mainly for work, especially for undergraduate students to submit their homeworks, projects, & other deadlines.

## Experience

- [2021--2024]: survivor, existential crisis, quest for meaning.

- [2020--2021]: PhD student, WIAS Berlin, Germany.

- [2019]: 3 months, Master Internship, IRMAR, France.

- [2025--2026]: Lecturer in Mathematics for AI/ML/DL/DS, School of Technology, University of Management & Technology, Ho Chi Minh City (UMT HCMC), Vietnam.

## Education

- Master of Science, Univerisité de Rennes 1
- Bachelor of Science, Ho Chi Minh City Univerisity of Science (HCMUS).

# Hobby -- Sở Thích

- Hobby: anime, cook, manga, manhwa, movie, lyrics, music, quote, sport, video, etc. [[pdf](https://github.com/NQBH/hobby/blob/master/NQBH_hobby.pdf)], [[Tex](https://github.com/NQBH/hobby/blob/master/NQBH_hobby.tex)].

# Writing: Science, Psychology $\Psi$, Philosophy $\Phi$ -- Viết Lách: Khoa Học, Tâm Lý $\Psi$, Triết Học $\Phi$.

**Preamble.** Define pseudoname/alias (bút danh): `alias` $\coloneqq$ `NQBH`. Perspective: more on personal life than on professional career.

- NQBH. [*How to Prompt AI: An "AI-Guided Personal" Guide of How to Prompt AIs -- Cách Prompt AI: 1 Hướng Dẫn Cá Nhân về Cách Prompt AI Được Chính AIs Hướng Dẫn*](https://github.com/NQBH/writing/blob/main/AI_prompt_guide/NQBH_AI_prompt_guide.pdf). [$\TeX$](https://github.com/NQBH/writing/blob/main/AI_prompt_guide/NQBH_AI_prompt_guide.tex).

- NQBH. [*A Theoretically Rigorous Atempt to Comprehend Some Theories of Human Personality Anatomy -- Thử Thấu Hiểu Chặt Chẽ Vài Thuyết Giải Phẫu Học Nhân Cách của Con Người*](https://github.com/NQBH/writing/blob/main/anatomy_personality/NQBH_anatomy_personality.pdf). [$\TeX$](https://github.com/NQBH/writing/blob/main/anatomy_personality/NQBH_anatomy_personality.tex).

- NQBH. [*Some Decision Problems: A Personal Perspective -- Vài Bài Toán Quyết Định: 1 Góc Nhìn Cá Nhân](https://github.com/NQBH/writing/blob/main/decision_problem/NQBH_decision_problem.pdf). [$\TeX$](https://github.com/NQBH/writing/blob/main/decision_problem/NQBH_decision_problem.tex).

# Payment & Donation -- Thanh toán & quyên góp/"cúng dường"

Nếu thấy (các) tài liệu có ích hoặc (các) bài viết hay nên thấy thích, cứ mạnh dạn chuyển khoản cho mình để mình có tiền mua cafe để nghiên cứu & viết lách tiếp: Mình chắc chắn sẽ không ngại. Ghi chú chuyển khoản nếu muốn.

I will sell my books & other art forms (if there is any) with reader-dependent cost. Sharing is caring (perhaps?).

## Bank Transfer Information -- Thông Tin Chuyển Khoản
Chủ Tài Khoản: `Nguyễn Quản Bá Hồng`.  
Bank: `Ngân Hàng Thương Mại Á Châu/Asia Commercial Bank (ACB)`.  
Số Tài Khoản: `1510717`.  
Chi Nhánh: `ACB-CN Bến Tre`.

# Visitors

## Flag Counters

<a href="https://www.flagcounter.me/details/cQh"><img src="https://www.flagcounter.me/cQh/" alt="Flag Counter"></a>

:::
